title: Russo, codefendants ordered to pay bank $850,000 tied to loans for beach house forfeited in 2006 corruption case - al.com
description: BAY MINETTE, Ala. -- Former Orange Beach Mayor Steve Russo, former City Attorney Larry Sutley and real estate developer Jim Brown have been ordered to pay Vision Bank more than $850,000 related to a Gulf Shores beach house the trio borrowed $2 million to build before being convicted in a federal bribery case.
